phrases.intent_en: Ask where the triple spiral staircase is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo ver la escalera de caracol triple?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh pweh-DOH vehr lah eh-skah-LEH-rah deh kah-rah-KOHL TREE-pleh?

likely_response.local: Junto al claustro, escalera de piedra a la
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL klah-OO-stroh eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH pee-EHD-rah AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: In the central courtyard, going up the stairs.

responses.english: In the central courtyard, going up the stairs.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL klah-OO-stroh eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH pee-EHD-rah AH LAH
responses.local: Junto al claustro, escalera de piedra a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ethnography galleries are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿en qué planta están las salas de etnografía?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, en keh PLAHN-tah eh-STAHN lahs SAH-lahs deh eh-tnoh-grah-FEE-ah

likely_response.local: Segunda planta, siga las indicaciones verdes.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah SEE-gah LAHS een-dee-kah-thee-OH-nehs BEHR-dehs
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Second floor, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah SEE-gah LAHS een-dee-kah-thee-OH-nehs BEHR-dehs
responses.local: Segunda planta, siga las indicaciones verdes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent audio guides
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo alquilar una audioguía?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh ahl-kee-LAHR oo-nah ow-dee-oh-GEE-ah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the left.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if tickets for temporary exhibitions are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay entradas para las exposiciones temporales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, AH-ee en-TRAH-dahs PAH-rah lahs eks-poh-see-SYOH-nehs tem-poh-RAH-les

likely_response.local: Sí, disponibles en la taquilla principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ dee-spoh-NEEB-lehs EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, available at the main ticket office.

responses.english: Yes, available at the main ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SÍ dee-spoh-NEEB-lehs EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.local: Sí, disponibles en la taquilla principal.
